Climbing Board Finger Strengthening Trainer Pull-Up Board Suspension Board Outdoor Climbing Arm Strengthening Training Tool

Description：

1.Improved Strength Training: Tackle more challenging routes while strengthening back arms and core, with a pentagonal grip designed for comprehensive finger and forearm training, enhancing overall climbing performance naturally

2.Improved Climbing Skills: This climbing fingerboard allows users to refine their grip strength and techniques at home, offering a simulated climbing gym experience while being lightweight and portable for daily use and easy wall or door frame installation

3.Quick and Dependable Setup: Equipped with a plywood backboard for secure attachment to wall studs, ensuring stability while adapting to various situations with a quick setup process and all mounting accessories included for convenience

4.Versatile Installation: Maximizes space utilization while seamlessly integrating into daily life, ideal for door frames, garages, and hallways, great for 30-second training process during fragmented time, widely used by climbing enthusiasts for convenience and versatility

5.Realistic Training Experience: Provides diverse grip angles to mimic actual climbing holds, improving finger strength, and replicating the feel of training on close-to-natural rock surfaces
Crafted from wooden materials, this climbing fingerboard provides a dependable tool for bouldering enthusiasts to practice and train effectively. Improve grip strength and tension with its thoughtfully designed block structure. Suitable for home gym setups or outdoor use, this gear serves as a must-have piece of equipment for climbers seeking versatile training options.

Specifications:

Product name: Climbing Fingerboard
Material: wood
Product size: about 20x20x3cm/7.87x7.87x1.18 inches
Weight: about 300g

Note:

Due to different lighting and screen settings, the item color may be slightly different from the picture.

Key Features:

Premium Boar Bristle Hair: Our brush features high-quality boar bristle hair that offers exceptional cleaning power. The natural bristles effectively remove dirt, chalk, and grime without damaging delicate climbing holds or the rock surface.

Perfect Size and Shape: Designed to fit comfortably in your hand, this brush features an ergonomic shape that allows for easy grip and manoeuvrability. Its compact size makes it convenient to carry in your climbing gear bag without adding unnecessary weight.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Built to withstand the rigours of outdoor climbing, this brush is crafted from durable materials that ensure longevity. Its sturdy construction guarantees reliable performance, session after session.

Versatile Cleaning: Whether you're bouldering, sport climbing, or trad climbing, our brush is ideal for all types of climbing holds. From small crimps to large slopers, this versatile brush will keep your holds clean and ready for your next send.

Environmentally Friendly: We care about the environment just as much as you do. The boar bristles used in our brush are sustainably sourced, making it an eco-friendly choice for all nature-loving climbers.

Maintain a strong grip and optimal performance on your climbs by keeping your holds clean and free from excess chalk buildup. Invest in the Nature Boar Bristle Hair Bouldering Brush and elevate your climbing experience to new heights. Add it to your gear collection today and climb with confidence!
